title: Contrast Pack
description: TexturePack that increases the contrast of the game, both menus, panoramas and GamePlay.
body:
CONTRASTpack elevates the game's aesthetic by increasing the visual contrast of each texture. With bolder colors, deeper shadows, and more defined details, your world will be much clearer, more vibrant, and sometimes darker and more terrifying, providing an effective atmosphere in many cases _ideal for any playstyle._ ### ✨ Key Features: - 🎯 Improved Contrast: Textures with greater separation between light and shadow. - 👁️‍🗨️ Improved visibility in combat, building, and exploration. - 💻 Optimized performance (16x) without losing aesthetic fidelity. - 🧱 Compatible with shaders and other visual packs. ![Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e1a22b817309f477c860728b7a514153b882dd.png) ![Badlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5357f82c9f8426d59ae57ec7a7ab3ab1f442e80.png) ### 📌 Compatibility: **Minecraft Java from _1.20.x_ to _1.21.x_**
